description: Style Note Have a blast on the field, or when you're out on an everyday jog, with these comfortable shoes from gas. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure, and are worth adding to your wardrobe as they're also a perfect casual option when teamed with jeans and tees. Product Details Olive green shoe with central lace-ups and overlays A padded tongue and inner Tough rubber outsole Thick TPU outsole has textured grooves Material and Care Leather Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
